name: Atlas Protocol - Escape Room
short_description: You appear in an abandoned facility without knowing how or when you arrived. "Atlas Protocol" will immerse you in an intriguing adventure full of mystery and suspense. Will you be able to unravel the enigma hidden in every corner? Dare to find out.
detailed_description:
Explore "Atlas Protocol", a challenging escape room set in a mysterious abandoned facility. Do you have what it takes to unravel its secrets and discover what has happened?

Characteristics:

  • Over 100 Puzzles to Solve: A variety of puzzles that will test your skills and keep you on your toes.

  • Immersive Exploration: Discover detailed environments full of clues that will guide you to the truth.

  • Deep Narrative: As you progress, unveil a mystery that will make sense of your surroundings and your story.

  • Ideal for Escape Room Fans: Designed for those who love mental challenges and unraveling mysteries.

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support
